name:
Ss PETER & PAUL, APOSTLES (JUN 29) 
MASS DURING THE DAY [ABC]

readings.summary: The Lord rescues Peter from Herod.

readings.citation:
Mass During the Day — Ps 34:2-3, 4-5, 6-7, 8-9, R. v.5
The angel of the Lord will rescue those who fear him.
readings.antiphon:
Mass During the Day — Ps 34:2-3, 4-5, 6-7, 8-9, R. v.5
The angel of the Lord will rescue those who fear him.

readings.summary: Paul concludes his letter, ready for the Day of the Lord.

You are Peter and upon this rock I will build my Church,
and the gates of the netherworld shall not prevail against it.
Jesus asks, "Who do people say I am?"

antiphons.text:
Peter the Apostle, and Paul the teacher of the Gentiles,
these have taught us your law, O Lord.

Peter said to Jesus:
You are the Christ, the Son of the living God.
And Jesus replied: You are Peter,
and upon this rock I will build my Church.
